value.found_quote: The `/fork` command clones your entire conversation history up to the current turn into a new, independent session.
value.rationale: The page explicitly documents the `/fork` command under the section "Branching with `/fork`", describing it as cloning the entire conversation history into a new, independent session for safe parallel experimentation. This directly substantiates the claim. The page presents this as a current, generally available feature with no indication of preview or deprecation status.
